price_2030_usd_tco2.notes: Dependent on ETS implementation and Climate Change Act

carbon_pricing.notes: CRITICAL CLARIFICATION: The January 2025 'carbon tax' (THB 200/tCO2e, ~$5.50-6) covers ONLY petroleum products (gasoline, diesel, jet fuel, kerosene, LPG, fuel oil) and explicitly EXCLUDES natural gas (60-66% of generation) and coal/lignite (17-20% of generation) used in power plants. Power sector has ZERO direct carbon price. V-ETS pilot is voluntary only. Climate Change Act expected 2027 will extend coverage to power generation with mandatory ETS pilot around 2029.
carbon_pricing.ets_notes: Climate Change Act (expected 2027) will cover coal and gas in power generation. MRV data collection 2026-2028 for ~3,000-4,000 entities. Pilot mandatory ETS ~2029 for ~300 entities.
carbon_pricing.source: Bangkok Post (January 2025); ICAP; TGO; IEA; verified January 2026

voluntary_carbon_market.notes: Premium T-VER credits have CORSIA approval for airline emissions offsetting.

solar_plus_storage.notes: Key benchmark for B3 LCOE crossover analysis

wind_onshore.notes: Limited wind resources outside specific coastal and northeastern regions explains higher costs

coal.notes: Includes Mae Moh lignite plant (2,625 MW)

national_targets.net_zero_notes: Government announced acceleration from 2065 to 2050 in late 2025. Official UNFCCC-submitted NDC target remains 2065 pending formal update.
national_targets.coal_phase_out_notes: PDP pathway includes closure of 2,625 MW Mae Moh lignite plant. Some unit retirements delayed to 2031.
national_targets.current_re_share_notes: Variation depending on inclusion of large hydro and imports from Laos

power_sector_context.market_notes: EGAT controls all wholesale electricity purchasing, high-voltage transmission, and dispatch

lcoe_benchmarks: BloombergNEF Thailand: Turning Point for a Net-Zero Power Grid (May 2025)

uncertainties: ETS implementation timing dependent on Climate Change Act passage (expected 2027-2029)
Actual pace of coal phase-out uncertain given recent Mae Moh retirement delays
Accelerated 2050 net-zero target not yet formalized in updated NDC submission
data_gaps: Offshore wind LCOE not available (limited offshore development)
Exact ETS coverage percentage pending final Climate Change Act provisions
